_note: SAMPLE / DEMO DATA — illustrative military-to-college-credit examples in the style of ACE recommendations. Real credit is determined by your Joint Services Transcript (JST) / CCAF transcript and each school's registrar. Numbers here are examples only.
howItWorks: Request your free Joint Services Transcript (Army, Navy, Marines, Coast Guard) at jst.doded.mil — it lists ACE credit recommendations for your training.
Air Force & Space Force: request your Community College of the Air Force (CCAF) transcript — CCAF is an accredited degree-granting college.
Send the transcript to your target school; the registrar decides what transfers.
ACE recommendations are advisory — schools vary widely, so compare a few before enrolling.

roles.title: Combat Medic Specialist
roles.note: Many states offer military-to-EMT license bridges; nursing programs may grant advanced placement.

roles.title: Information Technology Specialist
roles.note: Pairs well with CompTIA certs many schools also award credit for.

roles.title: Motor Transport Operator
roles.note: FMCSA Military Skills Test Waiver may also skip the CDL road test.

roles.title: Infantryman
roles.note: Leadership schools (BLC/ALC/SLC) carry management credit recommendations.

roles.title: UH-60 Helicopter Repairer
roles.note: Documented experience may qualify you to test for the FAA A&P.

roles.title: Hospital Corpsman
roles.note: Strong advanced-placement candidate for nursing/allied-health bridges.

roles.title: Security Forces
roles.note: CCAF may already bank these toward an associate degree.

roles.title: Tactical Aircraft Maintenance
roles.note: CCAF + documented experience can accelerate the FAA A&P.
